CREATE TABLE test_xor (a INT, b INT);
SELECT a, b, xor(a, b) AS result FROM test_xor;
SELECT xor(a, b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_xor WHERE a > 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (x INT, y INT);
SELECT t1.a, t1.b, t2.x, t2.y, xor(t1.a, t2.x) AS xor_result FROM test_xor t1 JOIN additional_data t2 ON t1.a < t2.x;
SELECT xor(a, b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_xor WHERE a <> b) AS filtered;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (m INT, n INT, o INT);
SELECT c.m, c.n, c.o, xor(xor(c.m, c.n), c.o) AS nested_xor FROM complex_data c;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, xor(a, b) AS xor_result FROM test_xor GROUP BY xor(a, b);
